single_agent.identified_root_cause: A newly deployed unindexed WHERE clause in the /api/users SELECT query caused a full table scan, increasing average query time from ~100ms to >15s — starving the DB connection pool, triggering thread blocking in service-api, memory bloat under sustained GC pressure, and cascading instance failures.

multi_agent_naive.identified_root_cause: Database query performance degradation causing connection pool exhaustion and cascading timeouts

multi_agent_negotiated.identified_root_cause: Database connection pool exhaustion triggered by unbounded concurrent queries against an unoptimized database query, acting as the primary root cause — with downstream effects including thread blocking, latency explosion, and cascading timeouts

log_analyzer.before: database query performance degradation causing connection pool exhaustion and cascading timeouts
log_analyzer.after: database connection pool exhaustion triggered by unbounded concurrent queries against an unoptimized database query, acting as the primary root cause — with downstream effects including thread blocking, latency explosion, and cascading timeouts

metric_monitor.before: database connection pool exhaustion leading to thread blocking and cascading performance degradation
metric_monitor.after: downstream database query degradation (unoptimized select on users table) causing queue buildup, connection pool exhaustion, and cascading timeouts

INC-2024-003.ground_truth_root_cause: Cache node failure causing a cache-miss storm that overwhelmed the database

single_agent.identified_root_cause: Simultaneous failure of cache-node-2 and absence of a covering database index on the 'category' column in the products table created a cascading failure: cache misses flooded the DB with expensive unindexed queries, exhausting connection pool and memory, which degraded API responsiveness and triggered OOM conditions and 503 errors.

multi_agent_naive.identified_root_cause: JVM heap exhaustion leading to GC thrashing and service degradation

multi_agent_negotiated.identified_root_cause: Cache failure (node-2 loss) triggering massive cache miss cascade, overwhelming the database and initiating a failure chain across service-api

log_analyzer.before: jvm heap exhaustion leading to garbage collection thrashing and eventual oom conditions in service-api
log_analyzer.after: cache failure (node-2 loss) triggering massive cache miss cascade, overwhelming the database and initiating a failure chain across service-api

metric_monitor.before: cache eviction or cache failure causing massive cache misses, forcing all requests to hit the database
metric_monitor.after: jvm heap exhaustion triggering gc thrashing, which degraded cache-client responsiveness and caused cache-node-2 connection loss — leading to cache bypass, database overload, and cascading request queue saturation
